title: Migrate remaining planning-config consumers; remove the flat config
description:
Move the remaining planning-config consumers onto the template registry, then remove the flat configuration.

Migrate scoped-validation boundary lookup and plan-content resolution to derive from templates, drop the planning-config struct and its load-time validation, and remove the flat configuration block from this repo's config and from the copyable example configs.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] [hard] CONFIG-01: Scoped validation still halts at the breakdown node, with the boundary derived from the template.
- [ ] [hard] CONFIG-02: Plan-content resolution derives breakable types and doc location from the template.
- [ ] [hard] CONFIG-03: The planning-config struct and every flat config block are gone; a repo-wide scan (including example configs) finds none.
- [ ] [hard] CONFIG-04: Validation behavior is unchanged for a bracketed container.
